creator: luciano@vespaperitivo.it
text:
scenario:

an amd64 ossec-hids server running ossec-hids-server-3.6.0_1 under FreeBSD 12.2-RELEASE-p3 GENERIC  amd64 serves various agents from amd64 machines without problems.

a PPC64 freebsd machine running ossec-hids-agent-3.6.0_1 under FreeBSD 12.2-RELEASE-p3 r369227 GENERIC  powerpc is not recognised by the server.


On the server I get a lot of 

2021/06/08 16:30:22 ossec-remoted(1403): ERROR: Incorrectly formatted message from '212.45.144.123'.

if I start ossec-remoted with debug option enabled.
